mapper.select: /* 설 명 : 중간고사기말고사조회 */ SELECT SO.SBJCT_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS MID_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS MID_EXAM_MNTS , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS LST_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS LST_EXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SO JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EB ON EB.SBJCT_ID = SO.SBJCT_ID AND EB.DELYN = 'N' AND EB.USEYN = 'Y' AND ( EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' OR EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST') JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL ED ON EB.EXAM_BSC_ID = ED.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ED.DELYN = 'N' AND ED.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SO.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} GROUP BY SO.SBJCT_ID

/* 설 명 : 과목게시판아이디조회*/ SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS NTC_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS ONE_ON_ONE_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS QNA_BBS_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'DATA' THEN BBS.BBS_ID END) AS DATA_BBS_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = BBS.SBJCT_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId}

/* 설 명 : 과목관리자조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' THEN U.USERNM END) AS PROFNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'COPROF' THEN U.USERNM END) AS COPROFNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'TUT' THEN U.USERNM END) AS TUTNM, MAX(CASE WHEN A.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'ASSI' THEN U.USERNM END) AS ASSINM FROM DEV_LMS.TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM A JOIN DEV_LMS.TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} AND A.SBJCT_ADM_SEQNO = 1 GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID

/* SQL ID : SubjectDAO.sbjctAdmList 설 명 : 과목관리자목록조회 */ SELECT ADM.SBJCT_ID , ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD , ADM.USER_ID , USR.USERNM , DEPT.DEPTNM , NVL(CNTCT.HOME_PHN, '-') AS HOME_PHN , NVL(CNTCT.MBL_PHN , '-') AS MBL_PHN , NVL(CNTCT.OFFI_PHN, '-') AS OFFI_PHN , NVL( CASE WHEN USR.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'INDV' THEN CNTCT.INDV_EML WHEN USR.USE_EML_GBNCD = 'LNKG' THEN CNTCT.LNKG_EML END , '-') AS EML FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM ADM JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = ADM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON DEPT.DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'HOME_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS HOME_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS MBL_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'OFFI_PHN' THEN CNTCT END) AS OFFI_PHN , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML' THEN CNTCT END) AS INDV_EML , MAX(CASE WHEN CNTCT_TYCD = 'LNKG_EML' THEN CNTCT END) AS LNKG_EML FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT CNTCT GROUP BY USER_ID ) CNTCT ON CNTCT.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE ADM.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} ORDER BY ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD , USR.USERNM

/* 설 명 : 과목학습활동조회 */ SELECT ACTVNM, TTL_KO, TTL_EN, CNT, SEQNO, HREF FROM ( -- 공지 SELECT 'NTC' ACTVNM, '공지' TTL_KO, 'Notice' TTL_EN, COUNT(BA.ATCL_ID) CNT, 1 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BA.BBS_ID = BBS.BBS_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'NTC' AND BBS.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE 1 = 1 AND BA.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY BBS.SBJCT_ID
-- QNA UNION ALL SELECT 'QNA' ACTVNM, 'Q&A' TTL_KO, 'Q&A' TTL_EN, COUNT(BA.ATCL_ID) CNT, 2 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BA.BBS_ID = BBS.BBS_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = 'QNA' AND BBS.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON BA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA2 ON BA.ATCL_ID = BA2.UP_ATCL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BA.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY BBS.SBJCT_ID
-- 1ON1 UNION ALL SELECT '1ON1' ACTVNM, '1:1' TTL_KO, '1:1' TTL_EN, COUNT(BA.ATCL_ID) CNT, 3 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA JOIN TB_LMS_BBS BBS ON BA.BBS_ID = BBS.BBS_ID AND BBS.DELYN = 'N' AND BBS.BBS_TYCD = '1ON1' AND BBS.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON BA.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL BA2 ON BA.ATCL_ID = BA2.UP_ATCL_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND BA.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY BBS.SBJCT_ID
-- 과제 UNION ALL SELECT 'ASMT' ACTVNM, '과제' TTL_KO, 'Assignment' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.ASMT_ID) CNT, 4 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ASMT_GBNCD = 'ASMT' GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
-- 토론 UNION ALL SELECT 'DSCS' ACTVNM, '토론' TTL_KO, 'Discussion' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.DSCS_ID) CNT, 5 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.DSCS_GBNCD NOT IN ('DSCS_SBST_EXAM_MID', 'DSCS_SBST_EXAM_LST') GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
-- 세미나 UNION ALL SELECT 'SMNR' ACTVNM, '세미나' TTL_KO, 'Seminar' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.SMNR_ID) CNT, 6 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
-- 퀴즈 UNION ALL SELECT 'QUIZ' ACTVNM, '퀴즈' TTL_KO, 'Quiz' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.EXAM_BSC_ID) CNT, 7 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
-- 설문 UNION ALL SELECT 'SRVY' ACTVNM, '설문' TTL_KO, 'Survey' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.SRVY_ID) CNT, 8 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID
-- 시험 UNION ALL SELECT 'EXAM' ACTVNM, '시험' TTL_KO, 'Exam' TTL_EN, COUNT(A.EXAM_BSC_ID) CNT, 9 SEQNO, '#0' HREF FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID', 'EXAM_LST') AND A.EXAM_GBNCD NOT IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID ) WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY SEQNO ASC

SELECT SA.SBJCT_ID SUBJECT_ID, SA.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD , S.SBJCTNM , S.CRDTS , U.USERNM, U.USER_ID , O.ORGNM , SA2.USER_ID TUT_USER_ID, U2.USERNM TUT_USERNM , NVL(A.CNT,0) AS ATNDLC_CNT , EXAM.MID_EXAM_SDTTM, EXAM.MID_EXAM_MNTS, EXAM.LST_EXAM_SDTTM, EXAM.LST_EXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON SA.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID AND SA.USER_ID = S.PROF_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = SA.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ORG O ON O.ORG_ID = U.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SA2 ON SA.SBJCT_ID = SA2.SBJCT_ID AND SA2.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'TUT' AND SA2.SBJCT_ADM_SEQNO = 1 LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U2 ON U2.USER_ID = SA2.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SBJCT_ID, COUNT(*) CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC GROUP BY SBJCT_ID ) A ON SA.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SO.SBJCT_ID , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS MID_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS MID_EXAM_MNTS , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM END) AS LST_EXAM_SDTTM , MAX(CASE WHEN EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST' THEN ED.EXAM_MNTS END) AS LST_EXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SO JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EB ON EB.SBJCT_ID = SO.SBJCT_ID AND EB.DELYN = 'N' AND EB.USEYN = 'Y' AND ( EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_MID' OR EB.EXAM_GBNCD = 'EXAM_LST') JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL ED ON EB.EXAM_BSC_ID = ED.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ED.DELYN = 'N' AND ED.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY SO.SBJCT_ID ) EXAM ON SA.SBJCT_ID = EXAM.SBJCT_ID WHERE SA.USER_ID = #{userId}
